cli::commands::plan::codex_local::build_.docs: Pre-track test shim for prompt resolution. Removed entirely in this track — both the #[cfg(test)] shim and the underlying production helpers are gone.
Pre-track test shim for Codex argv construction. Removed entirely — subprocess argv construction lives in infrastructure::codex_planner.

cli::commands::plan::codex_local::run_co.docs: Pre-track test shim for subprocess lifecycle. Removed entirely — subprocess orchestration lives in infrastructure::codex_planner.

cli::commands::plan::codex_local::codex_.docs: Pre-track test shim for codex binary path resolution. Removed entirely with the test shim block.

cli::commands::plan::codex_local::config.docs: Pre-track test shim for child process group configuration. Removed entirely.

cli::commands::plan::codex_local::prepar.docs: Pre-track test shim for session log path preparation. Removed entirely.

cli::commands::plan::codex_local::run_co.docs: Pre-track test shim for running the Codex child process. Removed entirely.

cli::commands::plan::codex_local::spawn_.docs: Pre-track test shim for spawning the Codex process. Removed entirely.

cli::commands::plan::codex_local::termin.docs: Pre-track test shim for terminating the planner child process. Removed entirely.

cli::commands::plan::codex_local::run_ex.docs: Test-injectable dispatcher: takes a closure for handling the PlanInput, allowing tests to mock the driver. Production caller is execute_codex_local. New in this track (thin-bin refactor, ADR 1420 D1 / ADR 1328 D5).

cli::commands::plan::codex_local::plan_i.docs: Convert clap args to PlanInput. Infallible — application-level prompt resolution and briefing-file existence checks moved to PlannerInteractor.run_codex_local in libs/usecase/src/planner.rs (T012). Test-callable private helper.

cli::commands::review::codex_local::revi.docs: Build ReviewInput from clap args and validated record args. Test-callable private helper introduced by thin-bin refactor.

cli::commands::review::codex_local::emit.docs: Generic over Write so tests can capture output without spawning stdout. Renamed from emit_outcome_output (which is action: delete, see existing entry).

cli::commands::review::codex_local::run_.docs: Test-injectable dispatcher: takes a closure for handling ReviewInput, allowing tests to mock the driver. Production caller is execute_codex_local. New in this track (thin-bin refactor, ADR 1420 D1 / ADR 1328 D5).
